site.name: Mutual Aid in Phoenix
site.tagline: Dignified, no-gatekeeping resources across the Greater Phoenix metro.

list.heading: Resources
list.search_placeholder: Search by name, description, or location

home.hero_eyebrow: Mutual aid in the Greater Phoenix metro
home.cta_aria_map: Browse resources on an interactive map
home.cta_aria_list: Browse resources in a filterable list

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have a new resource to suggest, a correction, or feedback on the site? Send us a note. Email is optional — we only use it to reply if you'd like one.
contact.feedback_placeholder: Report a problem, suggest a listing, or share how we can do better.
contact.success: Thanks — your message was received. We'll follow up if you left an email.
contact.error_generic: Something went wrong sending your message. You can file it as a GitHub issue instead.
contact.error_validation_feedback: Please write a message before sending.
contact.backend_pending_notice: The contact form backend is still being built. In the meantime please open a GitHub issue.
contact.required_hint: Fields marked required must be filled in.

footer.license_note: Listings licensed CC BY-SA 4.0. Code under MIT.

map.heading: Map
map.noscript_fallback: The interactive map requires JavaScript. You can browse every resource on the list view.
map.tile_error: The map failed to load. You can browse every resource on the list view.
